executiveSummary: Iteration 000002 fully satisfies all 8 functional requirements and all 4 user stories. Three minor issues identified during audit were resolved in a follow-up refactor. Test suite passes 17/17.
minorObservations: Float validation gap in --tolerance and --scale resolved: added regex /^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$/ guard to reject partial-numeric strings.
AC02 XML well-formedness check upgraded from substring heuristic to balanced tag-count + anchored root-element + document-end assertions.
AGENTS.md prose fixed: removed uv-specific qualifier from script layout preamble.
conclusionsAndRecommendations: All issues resolved. No technical debt carried forward from iteration 000002.

refactorPlan.description: Tighten float validation for --tolerance and --scale with strict regex check
Strengthen AC02 XML check with balanced tag count and anchored assertions
Fix prose: 'each as a standalone uv project' -> 'each as a standalone project'
